features.title: Platform Capabilities

hero.description: Continuously scan your infrastructure for vulnerabilities - faster, smarter, and at scale. No manual setup. Just results.

aiBanner.description: Auto Offensive doesn't replace skilled security professionals. Instead, we empower ethical hackers, penetration testers, and infosec practitioners with AI-driven workflows that handle the tedious work so you can focus on creative hacking, custom testing, and security research.

video.title: Discover Our Story
video.subtitle: Watch a quick walkthrough of the platform, tools, and workflow experience.

team.paragraph1: We launched as a team of passionate professionals and we've kept that mindset ever since. Our experts still drive product development today, focusing relentlessly on accuracy, speed, and control.
team.paragraph2: Every new feature comes from real-world experience. We constantly improve our work with updated techniques, smarter processes, and validation that reflects how things actually operate.

grid.sectionSubtitle: Enterprise-grade tools designed for security professionals

web.title: Web-Based Pentesting Automation
web.desc: Orchestrate complex security workflows without touching a terminal. Launch industrial-grade tools like Subfinder for discovery, Nmap for port mapping, and Nuclei for vulnerability scanning through a unified, high-fidelity interface.

ai.title: AI-Powered Security Analysis
ai.desc: Our neural engine digests raw scanner output to prioritize critical risks and explain complex vulnerabilities in plain, actionable language.

sast.title: Repository Scanning (SAST)
sast.desc: Seamless SonarQube integration for GitHub and GitLab. Find vulnerabilities in your source code at the speed of development, featuring AI-suggested remediation blocks.

cli.title: Managed CLI & API
cli.desc: A robust, cross-platform binary for remote tool execution. Integrate security testing directly into your Jenkins, GitLab, or GitHub CI/CD pipelines.

report.desc: Generate professional, multi-tier reports with a single click. From high-level Executive summaries to granular Developer fix-lists, our AI tailors the narrative for every stakeholder.

workflow.title: Integrated Attack Workflow
workflow.subtitle: Seamless transition from identification to exploitation.

cta.title: Stop writing reports. Start securing.

hero.subtitle: Run 20+ professional security tools from your terminal with zero installation. All processing happens on our secure cloud.

cards.title: Remote Execution
cards.desc: Executing auto-off scan triggers high-performance remote API containers. We handle the heavy lifting on our hardened cloud infrastructure.

cards.title: Cloud Sync & Auth
cards.desc: Authenticate using OAuth or API keys. Every command and scan history syncs to your secure dashboard automatically.

cards.title: Instant Results
cards.desc: No more waiting. Get shareable URLs and direct download commands like ao get-report to pull JSON or PDF data.

specs.title: Engineering Precision
specs.binaryDesc: Built with Rust for memory safety. Uses gRPC protocol for real-time streaming. Every session is ephemeral and audit-logged.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade your workflow?
cta.subtitle: Lightweight, secure, and ready for production.

hero.subtitle: Integrate deep-code analysis directly into your SDLC. Detect vulnerabilities before they reach production.

pipeline.title: The Analysis Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Four steps from code commit to security intelligence

steps.title: Connect
steps.desc: Native OAuth integration with GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket cloud or on-prem.

steps.title: Clone & Hash
steps.desc: Ephemeral cloning in sandbox containers. Every file is SHA-256 hashed for integrity tracking.

steps.title: SonarScan
steps.desc: Deep SAST analysis powered by SonarQube engines, identifying patterns of OWASP Top 10.

steps.title: Signal
steps.desc: Instant feedback via Slack, Jira, or inline PR comments with remediation steps.

finding.title: Critical Flaw
finding.desc: SQL Injection: User input concatenated directly into SQL query. An attacker could bypass authentication.

cta.subtitle: Start scanning your repositories in minutes.

hero.subtitle: Guardian AI bridges the gap between powerful open-source security tools and enterprise-grade usability. Run Subfinder, Naabu, and Nuclei in a seamless, unified workflow.

live.configDesc: Select your automated stack. No syntax flags required.
lines: Starting fast port scan on 12 targets

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.subtitle: The transition from manual terminal inputs to autonomous orchestration is handled by our Guardian Kernel.
howItWorks.noteBody: "Our backend translates your UI selections into optimized Go-binary commands, handling concurrency and resource management automatically."

steps.title: Target Input & Scope
steps.desc: Paste your root domains, IP ranges, or CIDR blocks. Guardian AI automatically validates ownership through integrated cloud connector APIs.

steps.title: Tool Chain Selection
steps.desc: Choose from our curated library of top-tier offensive security tools. Enable 'Auto-Mode' to let our AI select the best tools based on the target's technology stack.

steps.title: Autonomous Execution
steps.desc: The engine starts the sub-process chain. Data flows seamlessly from one tool to the next — Subfinder's output becomes Naabu's input automatically.

items.title: 90% Faster Setup
items.desc: Reduce scan configuration time from hours of scripting to seconds of toggling. Deploy complex reconnaissance pipelines instantly.

items.title: Democratized Security
items.desc: Enable analysts of all skill levels to run professional-grade tests without deep CLI knowledge, freeing senior staff for high-level strategy.

items.title: Centralized Logic
items.desc: Standardize your testing methodology across the entire organization. Ensure consistent tool flags and update versions globally with one click.

cta.title: Ready to automate your offensive posture?

toolsPage.title: The Auto-Offensive ToolKit
toolsPage.subtitle: Browse and launch industry-standard scanning engines from a single unified interface.
toolsPage.tryDifferent: Try a different search or category

hero.reconDescription: Speed up large-scale recon operations, eliminate noise, and deliver professionally customizable reports with a comprehensive range of recon tools for efficient penetration testing and vulnerability assessments.
hero.vulnDescription: Identify and verify vulnerabilities across your infrastructure with powerful scanning tools. Detect security weaknesses, misconfigurations, and known vulnerabilities with precise, actionable results.
hero.fuzzingDescription: Discover hidden endpoints, directories, and vulnerabilities with intelligent fuzzing tools. Map attack surfaces, identify web technologies, and generate comprehensive reports for thorough security testing.

items.subfinder: Passive subdomain discovery tool that iterates valid subdomains using multiple APIs and sources.
items.naabu: A fast port scanning tool focused on reliability and simplicity with nmap-like capabilities.
items.dnsx: Fast and multi-purpose DNS toolkit allowing multiple DNS queries with user-defined resolvers.
items.assetfinder: Find domains and subdomains related to a given domain using multiple open-source resources.
items.nmap: The industry-standard for network discovery and security auditing with NSE script support.
items.nuclei: Fast and customizable vulnerability scanner based on simple YAML-based templates. Automate security checks at scale.
items.wpscan: Black Box WordPress security scanner that detects known vulnerabilities in core, plugins and themes.
items.sqli: Detects and exploits SQL injection vulnerabilities through sophisticated payload testing and techniques.
items.strike3ifr: Advanced info-gathering analysis equipped with state-of-the-art Red Team bypass techniques.
items.urlfuzzer: Discover hidden files and directories in web servers using advanced wordlist-based fuzzing.
items.kitecrawler: Collects URLs for discovery and analysis for both REST API and dynamic web-based apps.
items.httprobe: Fast HTTP/HTTPS prober that takes a list of domains and probes for working http and https servers.
items.katana: Next-generation crawling and spidering framework designed to navigate complexity with JS parsing.
items.gobuster: Fast tool to brute-force URIs including directories, files, and DNS subdomain enumeration.

helpCenterPage.contactPrompt: Can't find what you're looking for?

whatIs.question: What is Auto Offensive?
whatIs.p1: Auto Offensive is a next-generation penetration testing platform designed for security professionals, ethical hackers, and organizations.
whatIs.p2: Our platform provides automated security workflows, vulnerability scanning, and comprehensive reporting tools to identify and address security weaknesses in your systems.

whoFor.question: Who can use Auto Offensive?
items: DevSecOps teams integrating security into CI/CD
Security researchers and bug bounty hunters
Students learning ethical hacking and cybersecurity

howStart.question: How do I get started?
steps: Sign up — Create a free account with your email
Configure — Set up your first scan target
Scan — Run your first vulnerability assessment
Review — Analyze findings in your dashboard
howStart.note: New users get 3 free scans per day to test the platform.

legalScanning.question: Is penetration testing legal?
legalScanning.p1: Penetration testing is legal when you have explicit authorization to test target systems.
legalScanning.warning: Important: Always obtain written permission before testing systems you don't own. Unauthorized access is illegal and may result in criminal charges.
legalScanning.p2: For owned systems, internal security testing is generally permitted. Check your local laws and organizational policies.

freeTier.question: What's included in the free tier?
freeTier.outro: Perfect for learning, personal projects, and small-scale testing.

apiAccess.question: Is there API access?
apiAccess.intro: Yes! Auto Offensive provides a RESTful API for programmatic access:
apiAccess.outro: API rate limits: 100 requests/minute (free tier), higher for enterprise.

dataSecurity.question: How is my data secured?
items: In Transit: TLS 256-bit encryption on all connections
At Rest: AES-256 encryption for sensitive data
Monitoring: 24/7 intrusion detection, WAF, DDoS protection
dataSecurity.outro: Each account is fully isolated at the database level.

teamCollab.question: Can I collaborate with my team?
teamCollab.intro: Yes! Our team collaboration features include:
teamCollab.outro: Enterprise plans include unlimited team members.

exportData.question: Can I export my scan data?
exportData.intro: Absolutely! You own your data. Export options include:
exportData.outro: Export from your dashboard at any time.

upgradePlan.question: How do I upgrade my plan?
upgradePlan.intro: To upgrade to Pro or Enterprise:
steps: Confirm and start using premium features
upgradePlan.outro: Enterprise plans include custom quotas, dedicated support, and SLA guarantees. Contact sales@auto-offensive.com

refundPolicy.question: What is your refund policy?
refundPolicy.p1: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for Pro plans.
refundPolicy.p2: If you're not satisfied, contact support@auto-offensive.com within 14 days of purchase for a full refund.
refundPolicy.p3: Enterprise contracts follow custom terms outlined in your agreement.

reportBug.question: How do I report a bug or vulnerability?
reportBug.intro: We take security seriously. Report platform vulnerabilities responsibly:

getSupport.question: How can I get support?
getSupport.intro: We're here to help! Reach out through:

hero.subtitle: By using Auto Offensive, you agree to use our platform responsibly. We built this tool for security professionals, not for causing harm.

acceptance.title: Acceptable Use
acceptance.intro: Auto Offensive is provided for legitimate security testing, education, and authorized penetration testing. By using our platform, you agree to the following:
allowed: Only test systems you own or have explicit written authorization to test
Use the platform for defensive security purposes only
Respect rate limits and fair usage policies
Report vulnerabilities responsibly through proper channels
Use findings to improve security, not for exploitation
blocked: Attack systems you don't own without authorization
Use automated tools for malicious scanning or DDoS
Share or publish vulnerabilities without responsible disclosure
Use the platform to harm, exploit, or steal from others
acceptance.notice: Penetration Testing: If you're a security professional conducting authorized assessments, you may test client systems with documented permission.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Activities
prohibited.intro: The following activities are strictly prohibited and may result in immediate account suspension:
items: Testing or attacking government, military, or critical infrastructure without authorization
Attempting to gain unauthorized access to systems or data
Conducting any form of DDoS or resource exhaustion attacks
Distributing malware, ransomware, or malicious tools
Phishing, social engineering, or identity theft operations
Bypassing or attempting to bypass security controls
Scanning or attacking targets in restricted jurisdictions
prohibited.warning: Warning: Violation of these terms may result in permanent account termination, IP blocking, and legal action. We cooperate with law enforcement when required.

account.title: Account Responsibilities
account.intro: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account:
items: Use strong, unique passwords and enable MFA when available
Keep your API keys and credentials secure
Ensure your team members understand and comply with these terms
Do not share account credentials with unauthorized users
account.notice: Enterprise accounts: Organizations must designate authorized users and maintain audit logs of all testing activities.

scans.title: Scan Limits & Fair Use
scans.intro: To ensure platform stability and fairness, we enforce the following limits:
scans.notice: Enterprise tier: Higher limits available. Contact sales@auto-offensive.com for custom plans.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.p1: Auto Offensive platform: All software, tools, code, and content are the property of Auto Offensive. You may not copy, reverse engineer, or distribute our proprietary technology.
intellectual.p2: Your findings: You own all scan results, findings, and reports you generate. We provide export options in JSON, CSV, and PDF formats.
intellectual.p3: Open source tools: Many tools in our platform are open source. Their respective licenses apply independently.
items: Export your findings anytime from the dashboard
Use reports for client deliverables and documentation
Share anonymized findings for community improvement
Resell or redistribute Auto Offensive scan data

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: Auto Offensive is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for:
items: Any damages resulting from your use of the platform
Loss of data due to service interruptions
Actions taken by third parties using your account
liability.notice: User responsibility: You are solely responsible for ensuring your testing activities are legal and authorized in your jurisdiction.

termination.title: Termination
termination.intro: We may suspend or terminate your account at any time for:
items: Violation of these Terms of Service
Failure to respond to security inquiries
termination.outro: You may delete your account at any time. Upon termination, we retain data per our Privacy Policy.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.intro: We may update these terms periodically. Significant changes will be communicated via:
items: Email notification to your registered address
changes.outro: Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Questions about these terms? Reach out to our legal and compliance team.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.heroDescription: Your data stays yours. We built Auto-Offensive with privacy-first principles — no data selling, no hidden tracking, just secure security testing.
